active_ingredients: Active ingredients (in each 30 mL) Acetaminophen 650 mg Dextromethorphan HBr 20 mg Phenylephrine HCl 10 mg
indications_and_usage: Uses temporarily relieves these symptoms due to a cold minor aches and pains headache nasal and sinus congestion sore throat cough due to minor throat and bronchial irritation temporarily reduces fever
dosage_and_administration: Directions do not take more than directed (see overdose warning ) do not take more than 6 doses (180 mL) in any 24-hour period measure only with dosing cup provided. Do not use any other dosing device. mL= milliliter keep dosing cup with product adults and children 12 years and over 30 mL every 4 hours chlldren under 12 years of age: do not use
